summary: Completed testing of Admin User Dashboard functionality. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend dashboard loads with all expected features.

ui_bugs.issue: User session occasionally gets logged out unexpectedly during navigation

passed_tests: Backend API /api/admin/stats returns correct platform statistics
Backend API /api/admin/users returns user list with enriched statistics
Backend API /api/admin/users/{user_id} returns detailed user information
Admin User Dashboard loads correctly with stats cards showing 9 users, 4 proposals, 2 confirmed bookings, AED 5,000 revenue
User list displays with all expected columns (User, Company, Role, Status, Proposals, Total Value, Actions)
Filter tabs are present and functional (All Users, Active, Suspended, Admins)
Search functionality is available with proper input field
View user details modal opens correctly
Admin dashboard accessible via footer 'Backend Admin Dashboard' link
User Management button navigates to Admin User Dashboard
User authentication and signup process works correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Session management issue causing occasional logouts during navigation needs investigation. All core functionality is working correctly.
